text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day after Grass Wonder's day off, I head over
to my office only to find...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I-I'm sorry. I only meant to take a quick rest
on the sofa.
choice_data_list: Did you get enough sleep yesterday?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well, I sort of lost track of time while gazing at
my moss terrarium last night.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
There is an art to growing moss in a glass tank,
and it brings me joy to observe its daily progress.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: But I need to take care not to let it cut into my sleep schedule... Yawn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Grass Wonder stayed up late rather than
get a proper night's rest.
